[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 1100100000 3
2 0110101010 5
3 1001001101 5
4 1111110100 7
5 1010100110 5
6 1011100111 7
7 1111101101 8
